title: Aurora Palm Pals, Safara The Giraffe Soft Toy, 33477, 5 inches, Multi-Coloured
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Giraffe cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves Giraffes
description: From the manufacturer Palm Pals Safara Giraffe Soft Toy Palm Pals Safara Giraffe Soft Toy fits perfectly in the palm of the hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and squishy. Her fur has the giraffe pattern and she has the cutest little face. This little giraffe has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone she meets.
